lifecycle.note: Sequenced after feat:tx-phase-legacy-alias-deprecation-001; no hard requires edge until the deprecation feature has passing tests and evidence.

features.title: Remove legacy transaction phase aliases

features.body:
This feature tracks symmetric WS and WSS JSON-RPC binding declarations, including explicit `framing=jsonrpc` semantics and JSON-RPC-compatible websocket subprotocol handling.

It is intentionally scoped to binding parity and validation on the active line. Frozen current-target certification remains a separate support-level question governed by the support matrix and release boundary documents.
features.description: Tracks canonical WS and WSS JSON-RPC binding parity and subprotocol validation, while live websocket route identity and Tigrcorn JSON-RPC end-to-end closure remain separate proof obligations.
features.title: WS and WSS JSON-RPC subprotocol parity

features.description: WS and WSS NDJSON framing scenarios are explicit and fail closed until implementation support exists.

lifecycle.note: WebSocket NDJSON moves from explicit fail-closed placeholder to implemented runtime codec adapter coverage.

features.title: WS and WSS NDJSON fail-closed framing support

features.body:
This feature tracks the canonical declaration of websocket post-handshake message framing independently from handshake subprotocol negotiation.

The canonical framing vocabulary is broader than the current mature runtime framing-atom closure. This feature therefore covers declaration and normalization semantics rather than implying that every declared websocket framing token is already a first-class runtime surface.
features.description: Tracks WebSocket binding framing declaration through the WebSocketBindingSpec canonical model and Ws/Wss semantic aliases. Runtime support for each app-level framing token remains governed by target-set and runtime-gating rows.
features.title: WebSocket binding message framing declaration

features.description: Canonical validation rejects incompatible websocket framing and subprotocol combinations.
features.title: WebSocket framing and subprotocol compatibility validation

features.description: WsBindingSpec declares handshake subprotocol tokens separately from message framing.
features.title: WebSocket binding subprotocol declaration
